title: Hong Kong Evangelion 222 Blu ray release for UK
display_title: Hong Kong Evangelion 222 Blu ray release for UK
wikitext:
[]: Hong Kong Evangelion 2.22 Blu-ray release for UK             Quote Post by flyingeagle666 » Thu Dec 30, 2010 2:46 pm Hi I was wondering whether anyone from region B has bought the Hong Kong release of Evangelion 2.22 on blu-ray? and whether it works in region B The reason I ask this is because I recently bought the Funimation US Evangelion 1.11 blu-ray which is region A but it does in fact work on my region B PS3. That release even though on all the sites says it is region A only is infact region AB. So I was wondering if anyone who has bought the Hong Kong release of 2.22 from region B has found this to also be the case? I wanna get the Hong Kong version but it would be pointless if it ends up not working thanks guys n gals

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Dec 30, 2010 2:55 pm I've bought it but I don't have BD player Life is funny

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 30, 2010 2:58 pm The Hong Kong release is in region A.

[]:             Quote Post by flyingeagle666 » Thu Dec 30, 2010 2:58 pm Xard wrote: I've bought it but I don't have BD player Life is funny

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Thu Dec 30, 2010 4:00 pm I think you should.. check details before buying the movie really-- Actually I think you've learned that if you're asking. But yeah region A. Apparently 2.22 will be out by the end of June in the UK. (according to MangaUK's twitter)

[]:             Quote Post by flyingeagle666 » Thu Dec 30, 2010 5:22 pm Hatsumi92 wrote: I think you should.. check details before buying the movie really-- Actually I think you've learned that if you're asking.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Sun Jan 09, 2011 7:02 am Xard wrote: I've bought it but I don't have BD player Life is funny

[]:             Quote Post by MarcG19 » Mon Jan 10, 2011 8:00 pm I have this Blu-ray and +1 to all the above. It's region A, it's BD25 vs. the BD 50 Japanese release and the translation is sometimes almost "somebody set us up the bomb" bad (I often just use the Chinese subs b/c they're leaps and bounds better). Better to get it off the torrents if you need it now and later (please) buy a proper Region B release.
